prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科热门专业持续高热推荐 ，与该校优势工科方向匹配；河北省2026年高考总人数约609800人，按近年物理类占比约59.8%估算，物理类考生约364000人，较2025年363040人略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；省控 线数据2026年缺失；中国矿业大学位于江苏徐州，属长三角地区，对河北考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在河北招生规模较大（物理类约235人）， 属于该校在省外的重要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次23383、2026年招生计划基本持平（仅增1人）、物理类考生总数略增、学校软科排名近年小幅下滑等因素 ，预计2026年物理类最低位次在23383基础上略有后移；预测最低位次约23473名，区间22973–23973名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 22793 → 22143 → 25093 → 27183 → 23383, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. After reaching a peak of 27183 in 2024, it rebounded significantly to 23383 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 5000 positions over the past 5 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 23383. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 259 in 2021 → 249 in 2022 → 241 in 2023 → 238 in 2024 → 234 in 2025, showing a gradual annual reduction. The 2026 plan is 235, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, essentially flat, with minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 67th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (59th in 2025, 54th in 2024), with a slight decline in recent years but still in the upper-middle tier of the national top 100. The 2023 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 68th, rated as average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms. No abnormal admission cutoff anomalies have been recorded, and the psychological expectations for applications are stable. Safety Science and Engineering (A+), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology (A-), and Civil Engineering (A-) are disciplines rated A- or above, with Safety Science and Engineering being at the national top level, highly aligned with the university's mining characteristics, offering some attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communications continue to be highly recommended, matching the university's advantageous engineering directions. The total number of Hebei Province Gaokao candidates in 2026 is approximately 609,800. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 59.8%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 364,000, a slight increase from 363,040 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, in the Yangtze River Delta region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Hebei candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Hebei (about 235 in Physics Category), making it an important source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 23383, the 2026 enrollment plan essentially unchanged (only an increase of 1), a slight increase in the total number of Physics Category candidates, and a slight decline in the university's Soft Science ranking in recent years, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward from 23383. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23473, with a range of 22973–23973.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Electronic Information Engineering / Integrated Circuit Design and Integration System.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation / Robotics Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering (including Mechanical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Energy and Power Engineering (including Energy Storage Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Safety Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mining Engineering (including Intelligent Mining Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering)
- Surveying and Mapping (including Surveying and Mapping Engineering, Geographic Information Science)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering
- Civil Engineering
- Geology / Earth Information Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 22973–23973, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 22973), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 23473), prioritize Tier 2 majors like Automation, Mechanical Engineering, Mathematics, and Energy and Power Engineering. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (23973), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors such as Safety Science and Engineering, Mining Engineering, and Surveying and Mapping as safety options. The university's Safety Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline, offering high cost-effectiveness.
